title: Fold Sum with accumulate
code: int total = std::accumulate(nums.begin(), nums.end(), 0, [](int acc, int x){ return acc + x; });
description: `std::accumulate` is the C++ equivalent of `reduce` — it folds a range left-to-right with an initial value. The lambda makes the operation explicit; for simple sums you can omit it entirely since `+` is the default. Requires `<numeric>`.
